sources.name: openai/skills
sources.notes: Treat this as a reviewed upstream catalog for selective skill installation and pattern study. Do not vendor the full catalog into the workspace.

sources.name: openai/codex
sources.notes: Codex CLI is already available on this machine via the Codex app bundle. Keep this as a reviewed upstream for official CLI and .codex surface conventions, not as a vendored workspace dependency.

sources.name: oh-my-codex
sources.notes: Prefer the published package or a dedicated fork outside the workspace dependency tree. Use this snapshot for review, comparison, and selective adaptation.

sources.name: oh-my-openagent
sources.notes: Keep this as a reviewed reference unless its license and OpenCode-specific runtime are an intentional fit for your local setup.

sources.name: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
sources.notes: Keep this as a reviewed upstream DESIGN.md catalog under tools/ref/. Install or refresh it with the reference snapshot sync script instead of treating it as a workspace dependency.
